ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-10-2005 IN 206, PLAINTIFFS LARRY BRADY, DONNA BRADY'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 01/23/06 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 01/13/06 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. DISCOVERY WILL REMAIN OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. PARTIES STIPULATE TO G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE THE NAMES AND ADDRESSES OF ALL IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY NOVEMBER 28, 2005, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES AND/OR DOCUMENTS AFTER THAT DATE, SAID WITNESSES AND/OR DOCUMENTS SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. THE STATUS AND SETTING CONFERENCE, CURRENTLY SCHEDULED FOR AUGUST 16, 2006 IN THIS CASE, IS HEREBY VACATED. PLAINTIFFS SHALL PROVIDE PATHOLOGY TO BERRY & BERRY BY NOVEMBER 17, 2005; BERRY & BERRY SHALL PROVIDE PATHOLOGY TO OTHER DEFENDANTS BY DECEMBER 1, 2005; DEFENDANTS SHALL PROVIDE PATHOLOGY TO BERRY & BERRY BY DECEMBER 15, 2005 AND BERRY & BERRY SHALL RETURN THE PATHOLOGY TO PLAINTIFFS BY DECEMBER 16, 2005. IF PLAINTIFFS ARE CLAIMING FRICTION EXPOSURE, GO 129, FRICTION INTERROGATORIES SHALL BE SERVED WITHIN TWO WEEKS; PLAINTIFFS SHALL NOTIFY ALL DEFENDANTS BY 4:00 PM TODAY IF ANY CLAIM OF PRIVILEGE IS MADE TO ANY DOCUMENTS CURRENTLY IN THEIR POSSESSION, CUSTODY OR CONTROL; ALL THIRD PARTY WITNESS DEPOSITIONS SHALL BE DONE ON FIVE DAYS NOTICE; PLAINTIFFS SHALL PROVIDE AUTHORIZATIONS FOR COMBUSIO AND DR. GORDON SMITH BY 4:00 PM TODAY. JUDGE: DAVID L. BALLATI COURT REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, CSR #4280 (206)

Motion For Protective Order To Limit The Deposition Of Larry D. Brady
Off Calendar Oct-11-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Carolin Shining for plaintiff and moving party: Larry Brady
Sonia S. Chabra for defendant and opposing party: Union Carbide Corporation
Constance McNeil for defendant and opposing party: Cooper Cameron
Lillian Ma for defendant and opposing party: Carrier Corporation
Michael J. Eng for defendant and opposing party: Ingersoll-Rand Company
Walter C. Runding for defendant and opposing party: Nibco Inc.
Law Barella for defendant and opposing party: Vasquez & Estrada

HEARING HELD and Plaintiff's motion for protective Order to limit the deposition of Larry D. Brady is: DENIED IN PART, GRANTED IN PART. The deposition is ordered to be conducted in sessions of 2 hours or less. The examination by defense counsel shall proceed accordng to the work history described in plaintiff's responses to general order interrogatories. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
